import os
from datetime import datetime


class User:
    def __init__(self, name, email):
        self.name = name
        self.email = email
        self.timezone = os.environ.get("USER_TIMEZONE", "UTC")
        self.locale = os.environ.get("USER_LOCALE", "en_US")


class Order:
    def __init__(self, user, items):
        self.user = user
        self.items = items
        self.currency = os.environ.get("DEFAULT_CURRENCY", "USD")
        self.tax_rate = float(os.environ.get("TAX_RATE", "0.08"))


class Product:
    def __init__(self, name, price):
        self.name = name
        self.price = price
        self.max_quantity = int(os.environ.get("MAX_ORDER_QTY", "100"))


class Invoice:
    def __init__(self, order):
        self.order = order
        self.prefix = os.environ.get("INVOICE_PREFIX", "INV")
        self.format = os.environ.get("INVOICE_FORMAT", "pdf")
